star_1.text: Pay to win in it's most trashy form! To compete at all you have to watch so many ads that it becomes so lame, so fast. If you do decide to play this free game for free, be ready for some serious gambling.. The slot machine and dice game are a scam.. then there's 8-3.. They set these high powered, long range guns right at the entrance. They can shoot you before you can shoot back, and make you run a gauntlet. If you haven't put real $ into your guns and your vehicles armor, good luck. 👎 👎

First of all the targeting is a joke. Your guns will lock onto a barrel before they lock onto an enemy. Everytime. Secondly, how is it possible to not die when no less than 15 hidden bunkers open and they all have kamikazes coming out all while your facing 10 bazookas and 10 turrets launching 12 missiles each. I'm not even exaggerating. That's on stage 6, level 3, easy mode. I know the game has to be challenging, but at some point you passed challenging and went straight to nearly impossible.

I enjoy the gameplay. It reminds me of the classic. But it is pay to win. It quickly gets so hard to kill even a simple foot soldier that it is almost unplayable before you can even get past the 9th stage. Even paying a little for some extras and the short-term ad free bonus get you so little that it isn't worth it. I'm sick of this sort of money grubbing.

It's a fun game but the energy situation sucks. Unless you feel like spending loads of money on this game, then don't even bother. Once you run out of energy, that's it. No more playing. Only way to get more energy is through in app purchasing or watching 5/5 adds. Plus obtaining in game currency is practically a waste of time. Hate to see such a great classic game get turned into just another scheme for money. Shame on the devs and their selfish ways.
Not fun when ads end gameplay.... force restart the game and lose progress.

I've been playing this for more than a year. Plain and simple: game idea is good, and it can be fun for a while... but in the end it's just another ads farm and PPL (pay per lose). In more detail: PvP is completely unbalanced, not real RPG or strategy features, absolutely no way of increasing your power without paying. At a certain point, you'll have to pay top dollar for small, random (yes, random) upgrades. Besides, there's no care for the loyal community of players.

Gameplay - as in the actual time spent playing through each level - cannot be faulted. And for that, the high star rating is justified. What ISN'T JUSTIFIED however is this game's egregious use of microtransactions. All but two vehicles are locked behind some form of paywall. The game even gives you a DAILY TASK to "make a cash purchase". It's frankly disgusting and shouldn't be tolerated.

The update ruined a reasonable game. Yes its heavy with ads but it's your choice to watch. However the updates take your abilities backwards so that early stages you completed easily become impossible. I suspect the response to this post will be 'fairness of the game' etc but that doesnt make sense for users that have spent cash previously. Advice is - don't spend cash on this game, it maybe lost in future updates.

DON'T DOWNLOAD. One word, GREEDY. This is just another pay to win cash grab game. It doesn't take long to be brutally underpowered. You spend more time watching ads than actually playing the game (30-60 ads a day). The devs will claim that you're not forced to watch ads, but we all know you'll never get anywhere in games like this if you don't. The top players have clearly spent thousands of dollars, and they always take all the top prizes, leaving nothing for the other players.

The worst game company ever. The most greedy people ever. You must pay or watch over 100 ads per day. And it's not 30 seconds ads. Most of them is over 1 minutes. And they set the lucky weels and other things which you don't get the expensive prices. I've tried for few weeks and no way you get a good stuff. If you just want to waste your time and money download this game.

Previously left a 2-star review about the absurd difficulty, unreasonable flood of overly hard enemies, the lack of weapon drops and upgrade materials. I saw the app was updated, so I tried it again... and you added a combo counter for killing enemies in a short period of time that has zero effect on gold, drops, power, etc. So now it's a one star review. I just got tired of playing an entire week to upgrade my truck once, with no weapon drops for my gun, so I'm uninstalling.

Game forces ads to keep up with enemies and controls don't work right, constantly had my jeep stop for no reason even though joystick was registering movement. Because of the tutorial also, I was forced to sacrifice an upgraded attack equipable for a level one of the same item. I do not recommend this game at all

More ads than any other game ever. Unless you want to pay a completely ridiculous amount of money on a phone game to compete, it's pointless to download. You honestly will spend 4 to 5 times more time watching ads than playing the game. No exaggeration. Extremely greedy developer. Probably the worst of the 100's of games I've played over the years. Pointless.

So the game itself was ok, I had fun with it but the reason for the negative review is the fact that the ads reward section is misrepresenting the prize, it says watch 5 ads with a picture of a vehicle next to it and so I watched it and nothing, so after poking around the game I come to find that its 70 ads and there was NO indicator when i was watching them that i wouldn't receive the items.

Edit: Submit a review and be branded a cheater. Original Review: The game is fun, there are ads for rewards, but you can play without watching them for a much slower progression. The biggest problem I have is that since the day I started playing, the Survival and Boss Mode always say no internet connection. The new PvP mode has said Banned since it was introduced. So for me much of the game is inaccessible.

The game is good, but technically it is bad and has several flaws,The box's that you win in Survival Mode do not give you all kinds of equipments, as if it was intentional to keep the player at the lowest level. Connect to the server is bad in PVP mod, as it takes you the number of attempts and lose stars without completing the game, the game loses connection once you enter. All this make it uncomfortable

The game is ok, but the upgrades that you have to grind for are absolutely not worth the time. The top tier vehicles that you have to spend $20 on, gives you the roughly the same stats as your starting vehicle; the only bonus is that it shoots extra rounds AWAY from the enemy. And if you get something like piercing shot, they nerf it so that each enemy takes 1/3 damage and it can only effect 3 enemies. Or double shot where each shot does 60% damage. Just terrible design for long term play.

How can you place other targets in a boss fight which attracts the aim even if the player is situated in front of the boss? How an projectiles be fired from out of vision with too much speed? How can a mine throwing range unit have more health than a melee unit? What is the point of power ups at the end of the level? One star because can't give zero. And please give some game design books to your game designers. Hi, it's a game, not a real-life war. Let it be it, Captain! Then let this be one.

Filled with predatory ads and bait mechanics. Like making you watch 5, 1 minute videos for a key. You need 2 to be able to use them and they won't let you watch more ads, forcing you to buy the other key with money. Edit: There is no "extra rewards" if you require 10 videos to get the reward and only allow me to watch 5, meaning you have to watch 5 videos for a key AND buy the other key with real money. This is what I meant by "forcing you to buy the other key with money".

None of the enemies or buildings get destroyed, so after a few moments, the enemies compile up and all shooting at you, your gun makes about 3 shots and then moves to another target but no one dies. I could barely get pass the first few levels cause even the buildings weren't getting destroyed to progress. I have uninstalled and reinstalled several times to of no avail. The game had potential but its no longer fun when the screen fills up with immortal enemies.

star_2.text: Advertisements as far as the eye can see, on any button that gives you ANYTHING, Even if it's a 'free' daily reward. Don't get me wrong, the game is simple and fun, what you actually get to play of it. The description should actually read, "click on our advertisers buttons for a few measly rewards and a couple of minutes of gameplay" it had big potential to be a great game, but the developers are too greedy. Enjoy your advertisements.

It's a good game and very fun. The problem is I've been grinding and watching ads for a while to build my truck without spending any money. But level 6-5 is the last level you will get to without spending money. Very sad. Put a lot of time into this game for it to turn into a money grab. Don't download unless you wanna spend loads of money because you can't finish without it. Don't care what the dev's say. And nobody wants to join groups for rewards or watch ads for a month to pass 1 level. SAD!

Love the theme of it but don't like how clutered your screen is with pop-ups, watch an ad for this and that, too many unnecessary clutter. The game feels slow paced and the mapping gets very weird in later stages. Some maps on hard difficulty are almost impossible with the amount of enemies and projectiles coming at you. Plus remove the price tags on the other tanks your limiting most of your players content. I unlocked all the tanks except the ones with price tags on them. Sorry but got bored.

Could be a good game, but there are no options in the game. No option to turn off the obnoxious voice that says "ok!" and "help me!" There's no option to lock the controls in one place on screen. Art design is good, music is good the rest is just a generic mobile game with no character or depth.

What you consider free is not free. If I have to watch a video or ad to get something "free " I'm still paying for it in time. That is UNACCEPTABLE, as well as misleading and false advertising. 😑 The best way to fix this would be to more accurately ask players to watch and be paid in (x, y, z ) rewards. Otherwise you are lying to your customers and that will never be good for business.

The nostalgia hit when I first played this. However after 2 weeks I can say this is a game about watching ads. Progress is slow, and even slower if you don't watch them. You'll never see any decent upgrades unless you spend $, and the difficulty spike is high after map 4. Gameplay has you blowing up hospitals and burning people alive in tents. There is an virtual control stick on screen at all times when you have your finger down, can't get rid of it. No S pen support for Galaxy note 20 either.

Sprites have different resolutions, looks awfull. Standard finds and also in hd. Movement of objects the same, just spinning and transferring without binding to animation. Effects in hd. Car goes throught any enemy. Mediocre music. Game have no effect of nostalgia att all. Looks cheap and have no soul. Do not recommend.

Unnecessarily complicated upgrade system and no balance for difficulties. Easy shouldn't feel hard, ever. Edit...removed one star for generic dev response. And yes....your game is set up to make those purchases necessary. Word of advice, don't argue with customers. And how about listing some reviews that are not b.s. This game has a crapload of ads and pay to play functionality. What a joke.

Up until the 4th of July, I really enjoyed the game and almost had the event's vehicle available. Then the next day when I went to exchange the items for it, the entire game is crashing after the Rocket logo screen. Have contacted the developers and have not had a resolve to the issue since then for the past week. Yet, according to the information it is comparable with my phone. So what the hell is their deal? Fix the issue or find new jobs!!!!

There is no collision/blocking i.e. you can drive right through tanks. Thats unrealistic. During the tutorial there was also no gunfire sound. Also unrealistic. Kickass commando and rip 'em one are far better made games with less predatory microtranactions. That leaves me no choice but to not recommend this game. And devs, if you delete this, I will just repost it. Try take the criticism and use it to improve your game.

The game has been made so hard that it becomes nonsense, in the level 8-5 just one bullet reduces 325 of your health and the whole screen used to get covered with bullets and missiles. And there no way to clear the stage in updated health of 3800. I don't know why you did it so hard that a player will start hating the game. Ridiculous

Ok.. but after a certain point it becomes p2w. That wouldn't be such a problem if it was .99 here or there but the prices for any sort of help full purchases are absurdly high. Some packs are $20-50. Bring the prices down and it may be worth revisiting

The games has paid only vehicles, take note that upgrading vehicle gives bonus to all others; and these are too overpriced to the point of being unreasonable. The VIP system go on for too long. This games very low variety on abilities you pick as you play.

It Brings back you to your childhood memories. But unfortunately, there are bugs in the game. After reaching 3 chapter. Enemies dont't die and they keep shooting. This started happening even for chapter 1 level 1 when i played it again to check. Please fix this bug ASAP. it takes all the fun away.

As soon as I heard the voice say "ok" and noticed the controls I said...nope(uninstalled). Nothing like the original, if you want to play Jackal you'll have a better experience using a Nintendo emulator and Bluetooth controller.

Its fun and entertaining , kinda old style game nice tiny graphics and levels. But whoever designed level 5-8 either made it that way so you have to eventually spend $ or was a worse level designer ever. It is not even like any other level or even similar one. Even har level of belows are easier.at least not impossible without paying $

I've deleted this game after playing for many months. There is very little progression from game play, so you have to watch the ads, up to 40 a day to get all the bonuses. Shame as the retro game platform is actually good.

I really enjoyed the gameplay I could experience so far. But sadly, the game just randomly crashes mid start or while playing. It works for a period of time if I clear the cache every time it crashes. Hope to find a solution soon

A fun game dragged into the dort by being made by greedy talentless robots. The initial gameplay is very fun and progressing feels natural and good. But give the game 1 hour and you realize it's just another generic garbage game. It has no artistic value, it has no gameplay value. It is just another terrible artless cashgrab. And I'd bet 1000 dollars that the "devs" won't even read or reply to this criticism. Why? Because this is a nothing game made by a nothing company with worthless employees

I've been playing the game for a little while now And what I've noticed just like many other reviews once you hit level 6 level 7 it gets so hard that you cannot pass Without spending a bunch of real money I am leaving the game because of this

star_3.text: The game had been a lot of fun, up until around zone 6. Specifically the 6-5 boss. The game almost suddenly increases the difficulty to impossible, unless you spend a significant amount of money. I have gotten every medal in the game up until zone 6, and have even spent a small amount of money. Still, the upgrades achieved by literally 100%ing the game up to this point and paying for some crates, are not even close enough to beating this level. It seems impossible to make any progress forward.

It's fun to a point, but for half decent rewards you've got to watch ads for everything. You can make a few stages before you'll have to start dumping real money into the game to get the upgrades you need to make it through boss battles. Also, anytime I try to do anything other then a standard mission I get the "no internet" error. Kind of kills the fun.

I can almost admire a game that makes you opt in to nigh-constant advertisements, but that's an "almost." Around World 2-6 your weapons will slowly lose all effectiveness, requiring you to watch ads, gather login bonuses, and otherwise NOT play the game to progress. But hey, at least it doesn't MAKE you watch the ads. You get 3 stars for that.

The game is pretty fun, but it's VERY pay to win and progression is insanely slow. Also, PVP mode is completely unbalanced. There's absolutely no reason that I, who have been playing for a total of 5 days, should be put up against someone who's 20 levels higher than me with max gear. The first enemy in the PVP stage will kill me in one hit. That needs to be fixed to be more fair.

Game was fun for some time, but now it is dead. No support, cannot sync progress anymore, no events. Anyway, for anyone who liked this, try shooter.io, basically the same game, same graphics, same levels, but more buffs and other bonuses..

It's okay. It was fun until the talents kept picking the same ones. It becomes annoying. The game is like achero, the differences between the two are you can shoot while you move around and you can't pick what skills are dropped. That's the only difference. The ads doesn't allow you to finish all in one go. The skills and feel of the gameplay imo is not as smooth as archeo. So meh, I don't see why people would give 5 stars rating to this game.

Its alright, gameplay loop is pretty fun but upgrading rarity of items is very hard. Game offers no solid way to do this apart from rewards for completing a level for the first time, after that its a very rare drop from enemies or from chests. Also having enemies spawn behind you and other enemies being able to attack you from 2 screens away (rockets) feels a bit cheap

You still spend money and don't get much. It takes a really long time to upgrade weapons because what you get through unlocking chests is mostly what you don't need or want...even when you purchase the Super chest. Now there's an update that won't finish, in the middle of this Summer event, so I can't get what I was playing the event for. Convenient placed so you can't get the weapon or vehicle you need.

Instead of adding a new ways to spend the money, developers should pay a little more attention on the balance in the game. I have reached 10th stage, and now it is absolutely imposible to continue with a progress, because enemies have silly big amount of health, and my tank makes very small damage (btw, player exp is lvl 50). Boss on the stage 10 is OP. It is a nice game in the few first stages, but later: forget about your nerves and fun.

Love play, nfact say it's best freemium I've seen, only still freemium. Lots locked b/h ads which isn't big deal til day by day watching all vids to get every ounce of rewards then do it again an hour til a days wait. U Can play w/o ad watch but slows advancement and u feel like u miss out b/c difficulty jumps every lvl n feels req'd. So much depends on ad loot theres page dedicated to it, plus in-game ads! Again, great play, graphs, eggs, boss', lvls n modes just can't watch another ad or pay!

Gameplay: 5/5 (4h, zone 1 & 2 w/ full star) Lvl design:4/5 (Dropped gold too far away on ridges can't reach sometimes. Increase pickup radius) Ads: 5/5 (no forced ads, & has rewards) Rewards: 2/5 ("free" battlepass behind prem. currency. Battle reward gold amount too little) Difficulty: 2/5 (Little differences between easy and hard ones. Same with rewards mostly) Gameplay is nice but gold cost will hold you back in late game unless youre gonna spend real money to buy in-game premium currency

It's a fun and easy game to get into when you start. After playing for a few months, expect that you simply can't go any further to finish the game. I watch the ads, I grind, but you'll get to a pint where you simply can't proceed anymore. And no, I'm not going to Facebook to get codes for stuff. That's a very poor way to have the game end.....it never does.

A fun game with design flaw. It's a happy marriage of that old NES game and Arch Hero. No complain on the control. However, with games like arch hero, you go to a lvl, it has many stages, you choose 1 out of 3 skills between each stage, you can build up some power. But this game, you get just 1 slightly longer stage, and power up item is inconsistent, no choice, often healing item when you don't need. And as soon as lvl is over, all your power is gone. No momentum.

Good premise, awesome graphics and cool sounds, sadly game play is just okay. Moving the jeep around and have it auto fire, without any sort of expendable you choose when to use gets old fast. Run into a bug on level 3-2 where some enemies become totally invulnerable. That was enough to quit.

Not bad. Good nostalgic feels come at first bit I uninstalled because it got boring as it struggled to find the balance between challenging and fun. The difference between getting stomped and being the boot was normally one more upgrade that isn't really hard to get, then you replay the level and mop.

You can chill out and ride around Tearing through the various Of the units different shapes and sizes and Types And there is always something new in the shop. however it just needs to be polished or something simply put it's missing something major but I don't know what. Perhaps I'm just not a 8-32-bit kind of person anymore.

it's a good game, but I'd recently uninstalled it due to storage issues. after fixing said issues, and reinstalling, there's no way for me to resync my data even though I used the signin feature. so I've lost all my progress, and months of time.

The game is pretty fun if not a bit aggravating!! I speak only one language an only understand that one language as well!! So imagine my surprise an ire when I logged in to the game and find almost everything is in some script looking language!! Not faulting the game for glitches as I know that's all a part of it, so I will say this in closing: Is it fun an able to kill time effectively: Yes!! Is it annoying at times: Hell YES!! Is it still worth the download: Yes it is!!

Please add special (additional) weapon, like a missiles, granades, orbital strike, airstriie, napalm. Also add temporary powerups like magnet, speed up, shield etc. Add a little minimap. Add track marks, engine, break sounds, muzzle flash, smoke, realistic gun sounds instead of laser pew pew pew sounds. Add temporary companion in level to rescue who will accompany you for a short while especially during harder parts of the game. Gsme lacks substance

Really good game and would give 5 stars but now it's getting almost impossible to go further without spending money. Really hard to upgrade anything especially the vehicle as the materials are slow to gather. Such a shame spoils a really enjoyable game.

star_4.text: I'm not sure what people are complaining about. This is a game that doesn't pretend to be anything but what it is. A nice drive and shoot game. No forced ads, options to pay or watch to upgrade, and decent recovery of energy. It's a little slow to upgrade at times but not outlandish so. Overall its not to bad and a descent time killer. If you're looking for something with a plot, or super high res graphics, you're out of luck but otherwise its descent.

Actually, I was surprised at the fun I am having with this game! It is challenging but not impossible, and I enjoy the retro graphics and music. My only complaints (which are minor) are that you have to unlock hard mode for each level, and that I think the upgrade system is unnecessarily complicated. But both of those things are manageable, and I think this is at least a four star game!

It isn't terrible, great art, nice sound, alright gameplay, it doesn't quite hit that nostalgia spot like other games at the playstore do (like for example Team Six which is a great homage to the classic Cannon Fodder). By all means not a bad game and it deserves a chance, if you have played other Archero-like games you know what this has going for.

Overall the game is fun. Does have a high level difficulty in the upper levels. Few things that need to be fixed. 1. The snow sinpers can shoot through walls, that I can't. Same with the flame guys. They already have very long reach, this just gives them an advantage that is not needed. Part of the strategy in this game is shoot and hide. Can't do that with them. There are a few other minor things, but those two need to be addressed.

Very enjoyable game. I was able to play a total of 18:16 (18min. 16sec.) without a single forced ad. At the same time it had asked for a review. The pay to play packs are a little bit obnoxious for taking a decent chunk of screen space. The in game "announcer" or indicator voice is weird, at times annoying. Overall it's a well put together game. The graphics are nice with a good amount of detail as well. I support it having microtransactions. It does need a good bit of work, but is a keeper.

Interesting enough except a few elements were absent, which are present in the classic 8bit. You can run over infantrymen there but not here. I get that there are suicide bombers that you needed to stay out of. Another is the you can't fire rockets, which is supposed to be a secondary fire or sidearm. Well, at least you should have added special active skill for each vehicle (i.e. the Jeep normally fires either a grenade or rocket, the Tractor can shoot a mid-ranged flamethrower, etc).

This game is very fun for a pass time with old school yet nice graphics. Has not given any issues like crashing or lagging yet although still new at it. It's a busy game but not super overwhelming. One of the best games to kill time and have some fun. I recommend. I would give it 5 stars but although it's not pay to win the rewards are a little low and uf you want to beef them up you have to watch adds to get some extra free stuff but other than that real good game.

Man, this game is just way too much fun! It totally reminds me of an ld arcade game I played back in the 80s, only this is much improved. The only improvements I can think of would be more content and a way for 2 or 3 players to play special randomly generated sandboxed levels. No PvP, though: that stuff is for uncouth, toxically competitive punks.

Pros: Fun, in the spirit of old school gaming. On 1-7 you can find the duck hunt dog and shoot the ducks. Check the bushes. Doesn't pretend to be what it's not. Well made, attention to detail, decent chat. Cons: Cash grabby, forces you to play on easy before you can play normal, only so many avatar options. Overall: This is not the original Jackal. If you go into this expecting it to be, you will be disappointed. If you go into this, looking to enjoy a fun arcade shooter, you will love it.

Well, I just deleted the game after 250 hours. Why? Because playing honestly isn't fair. After opening 27 chests I have received first epic gun. Ridiculous. And enemies, like those red jumpers are stupidly hard to kill. Annoying. Moreover you WILL NEVER know that there are LEGENDARY or MYTHICAL weapons unless you install money MOD, playing honestly I'd need like 150000$ to have enough guns to fuse. So, the 100% of content is only available for donaters. Screw it.

Amazing game and the lack of ads make it a big plus! Game played like it did in ads aswell which is unlike a lot of other games out atm. Only drawback i think is the battlepass whoch is £5 weekly. Thats a lot of money for 16 tiers which can be completed in 3-4 days. Prefer either a longer battlepass with more tiers or cheaper week by week.

Fun game! Reminds me of Mr. Autofire/Auto Hero as far as equipping items and upgrading them. The one complaint I have however is the obnoxious sound when destroying buildings (except the power station at the end of each map), vehicles, and paratroopers. Destroyed buildings should sound more like a crumbling sound or similar to the power station when destroyed. Vehicles should sound more like the barrels when they explode. Paratroopers should sound more like ground troops when killed.

please add the local multiplayer feature with tethering/hotspot also the same wifi. there is a mode to complete levels with friends and a versus mode where you attack each other's bases. I hope this game becomes my favorite game like soul knight, otherworld legends, and others similiar game when played with my friends. I love offline games with local multiplayer. also this game need gamepad support

Absolutely brilliant little game, fantastic retro art style and excellent music (the survival mode music is brilliant, releasing an extended OST download would be easy money). The gameplay is great, if mildly grindy, although can be a little unfair at times (rocket trucks can do one). The only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is the performance is a tad poor when a lot is going on, there are almost zero ways of getting better parts and most packs are obscenely expensive for terrible items.

Pretty fun game actually. No forced ads. Great gameplay. Only downside is there are so many chances to watch an ad for extra loot that you have to either grind the whole time or spend more time watching ads than play the game. Other than that it is a great game.

The "fuse" feature is great but it would be great to be able to fuse like items rather then exact same items. Accumulating 3 of the same takes a long time. It already gets hard in high levels. Being able to fuse like-equipment would improve the game.

Fun game. No forced ads which is great. Easy to just waste tike on. I've nearly 100% act 1 except for 1-4 due to a bug where not all of the enemies spawn which (only on easy diffuculty) is keeping me from receiving all of my rewards. If that got fixed then I'd give 5 stars.

Gotta say I love the game...aside from the constant bugs you guys have where if you watch a video the game freezes. Only game on my phone that does that, but also the game I play the most. Get your stuff together and be better.

This game is cool it has pixel art design and design. But theres some problem. The tanks is not enough it needs more tanks cuz theres less tanks in the game. And the game is little hard to me i cant beat the zone 5 its too hard. The game is unrealistic and the controls need to be better cuz i need shooting controls too cuz theres somethings that i dont wonna shoot but it shoots itself and the last thing is meybe its better when the sceen is horizontal. But wow its still a great game thank you😊

Great game, I love the pixel look it makes it look retro. The gameplay is simple and you get the option to watch ads which is always good but there's just one problem whenever I connect a power up it doesn't work so if you could fix that that then the game would be sooo much better

star_5.text: I love this game, so much fun. It's very easy in the first 5 or 6 chapters, but then begins to become a real challenge. The classic feel brings back lots of great memories also. One only had one issue with the game, which was a glitch that was happening that made the game impossible to play, but I emailed the devs and left a description here of what was happening. The next day the issue was fixed with an update. I'm super excited I can play again.

Very "metal slug" feel to the game. It's not heavy on the "pay to win". Even the video ads that you can watch in exchange for loot say "We are sorry to include this in the game but it helps us develop it". I've never seen a mobile game that APOLOGIZES for including ads. The game has been VERY enjoyable so far. Anyone who enjoys metal slug, shoot em up, bullet hell games... You should download this. You will have a lot of fun, even if you don't spend a penny. keep up the great work, devs!

this is a great little game. it's basically a hybrid of the old NES game Jackal, with more polished Metal Slug style visuals and sounds. it's balanced well, not too easy, not too hard. bosses are cool. pixel graphics are legit and spot on. the only thing id adjust are: sound fx can be very quiet and then very loud. some need normalization. music volume needs to be raised, but again, at end of level, it gets very loud. and finally, your jeep could use grenades like in the original Jackal!

Super fun arcade style shooter with especially smooth control, added plus that I don't have to hold my phone sideways when playing. I really dig the look of everything and the nostalgic pixel art color scheme. Don't be like me and dismantle duplicate parts, fuse them HA! The ads aren't overbearing and when they spring an ad on you they tend to be short and skippable. It's a good free game with game mechanics that make it different enough to not be just another top down aero fighter clone.

Awesome gameplay. I'll keep playing it but there are some cons. Coins (basic currency) turns irrelevant as you get much more than you can spend. Unless you buy boxes with cash (u know the deal, achievements wont give you enough of it), to have enough materials for upgrading equipment. Fusing equips is another thing not happening a lot for those not buying a lot of boxes, wich is a bummer because i like that feature. Also would be cool to gather more perks in each mission if they were longer.

actually it is a good game. Positive things are there is no forced ads, only rewarding ads. You mostly depends on your skill to pass levels, not like other games which you depend on constant (expensive) upgrading to pass levels. Graphics is not so good, like old NES games, but it is simple. Cons is still pvp mode is difficult. Most of the time you are matched with much stronger opponents. My suggestion is try to level up until at least you pass level 10, then you have chance to beat it

Amazing game, I disliked the need to play the same level 3x (easy, normal, hard) in order to pass to the next stage in order to unlock better playable modes and items; this makes it very repetitive which is why I deleted the game after. But it was fun for a little while.

Well done. needs more tweaks here and there but the game itself feels fluid. the only things i could suggest is the 1.) fuel system must be increased 2.) longer stages - complete with mini boss and a boss (of course) as it is now, it's already a better game than the Hero sequels.

It's almost like the developers grew up in my old neighborhood pumping quarters into the same arcade games that I used to play. It has the classic feel of Ikari Warriors, and the gameplay is ridiculously simple but fun. The upgrade options modernize it into a fun mobile game that scratches that nostalgia itch. Had to force myself to stop playing to come give the developers their props. Good job.

I love the ads set up. more games can learn from you. It's hard to get into games when they break up your play session every minute for an ad. Free Time is more rare these days and many phone games don't respect the players Time. I love that when I want to play games...I can actually just play games, then when I have a moment to roll up, make food, or clean up a bit.... I can blast through 10+ ads for rewards. PLEASE DONT CHANGE THIS. I hate when games Force Feed you ads after everything you do

The difficulty levels need adjustment, or renaming. On easy, I was very nearly able to stand toe to toe with the first boss, not even moving. Hard wasn't to much harder, got him down to half health before having to move. Very nice little tribute to duck hunt though, that by itself was worth a star to me!

Great game free to play addictive. Getting tougher though, The game does entice you to spend money but you can go back to the beginning if you can't clear a certain boss to gain stuff to improve your vehicle and your weapon of choice then go back to the boss to try to defeat it. I don't understand why reviews are complaining about ads you don't have to watch them if you don't want to 🤔

I don't usually review apps or games but this I have because it is simply great. There are pay to win elements but you can still grind and have lots of fun without paying. The developers add new functionalities often and it does truly feel like they're passionate about their game. If you like challenging, retro style games, this one's for you!

After reporting a fatal bug in the game, the developers have the bug fixed within a couple of hours. Most game developers typically ignore fans and players about issues. Not this developer, very fun game to play, however it is a game of grinding. Just stick with it. You will be stalled for a while at some points of the game.

Hey, guys! Awesome gameplay. Love it! Really appreciate the fact that the adds are not just randomly pushed on you, but rather when you do a certain action. But tell me please, by when we should expect the awesome, mind-blowing, thrilling, exciting, breathtaking, magnificent "Guardian" part of the game😃

Good laugh this game, thought the ad looked good so I downloaded it, wasn't disappointed 👍🏼 UPDATE: If the wonderful devs could make it possible for us to dismantle weapons without scrapping them and also to dismantle the titanium from vehicles to enable more experimentation with loadouts rather than being tied to one setup due to lack of transferable resources, that would turn a nearly perfect game into a basically flawless one 🤞🏼

This game is pretty nice I like the way how the mechanic works and the old 90's designs, the theme the controls, I like it alot no difficulties on controlling things, I haven't even experienced any bugs since I started playing the game, overall it's pretty good..

Just started playing this game. It's pretty much like other bullet hell games, but this one's nostalgic in a way. Microtransactions wil always be there, it's up to you whether you'll be a P2P or F2P. Not sure if I'll be playing the game for a long period of time, however for someone who played the original game of the same name, I'd suggest for other to try this.

Great Game! Cool Revamped Jackal from the old 8-bit days.This ones pretty neat for an Android Revamp of Jackal..new Maps..Advanced Graphics and this game is "F.U.N!" Like its got what you need..Commando-Style Jeeps and Tanks..You get to Drive in a War and the unit auto-locks on enemies.I've played about 3-4levels and can say "Worth a Go!" Very Nice! So a Good "Well Done to the Jackal Squad Creators! You made a Hit! 5/5⭐**Android Gaming Choice**(Highly Recommended)

Finally a game I love bringing back the retro atari style. For those who don't know what an atari is...... Google it!!! Authentic game play music and sounds the classics never die. Good job guys looking forward to more games like this. The only thing that's missing is the joystick and 2 tap buttons.
